mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, display_name, email, scope_type, tenant_id, enabled, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_account WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, username, password_hash, display_name, email, scope_type, tenant_id, enabled, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_account WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.scope_type, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM role r INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.code, p.name, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM permission p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.code, p.name, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM permission p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE rp.role_id IN
#{roleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM user_account WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (username, password_hash, display_name, email, scope_type, tenant_id, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{scopeType}, #{tenantId}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO user_role (user_id, role_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS id, u.username AS username, u.display_name AS displayName, u.email AS email, u.enabled AS enabled, u.tenant_id AS tenantId, t.tenant_code AS tenantCode, t.name AS tenantName, r.code AS roleCode, r.name AS roleName, u.created_at AS createdAt, u.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM user_account u INNER JOIN tenant t ON t.id = u.tenant_id LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.scope_type = 'TENANT' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET display_name = #{displayName}, email = #{email}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE user_account SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE user_account SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE user_account SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) FROM user_account u INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.enabled = TRUE AND r.code = 'TENANT_ADMIN'
AND u.id != #{excludeUserId}
